sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70938" key="nomadi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νομαδ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n70938.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nomad, pastoral,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βίος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
